title: Bouldering and Running in the Enchantments
summary: After leaving our nice riverside campground, we made our way to Leavenworth for a weekend of bouldering with my friend Kenley. On our way to camp, we stopped in the Bavarian themed downtown to sightsee and eat a famous bratwurst. Afterwards, we had a relaxing afternoon finding a camp spot, journaling and reading. We had an early wake up the next morning so that I could run the Enchantments Traverse, an 18-mile trail that crosses the beautiful Enchantment Mountains. I had a wonderful day out on the trail, enjoying the amazing views of snow covered peaks and alpine lakes. The next morning, Helen left for Missoula and I spent the remainder of the weekend bouldering with Kenley and some of his friends. It was a great weekend of climbing, mountain biking and spending time with old friends.
